title: Clean up duplicate/dead code
description: Identify and remove duplicate code and unused artifacts across the codebase to reduce maintenance burden.

title: Phase 1: Extract app.py and brain.py from install scripts
description: Extract the Flask application and brain module from heredocs in install.sh into standalone files under app/

title: Phase 4: Tilt + KinD Kubernetes environment
description: Create Tiltfile, k8s manifests for local Kubernetes dev with live reload

title: Phase 3: Docker Compose local environment
description: Create docker-compose.yaml with indigo service, model volume, and config

title: Add unit tests for survival_tools.py
description: survival_tools.py has pure functions (morse encode/decode, WAV generation) with zero tests. Add pytest-based unit tests for comprehensive coverage. This is the highest-impact easy win.

title: Phase 5: Getting Started docs and README update
description: Create docs/getting-started.md and update README.md with containerized dev links

title: Add pyproject.toml with ruff/pytest config
description: No pyproject.toml, linter, or formatter config exists. Add a proper Python project foundation with pyproject.toml including ruff and pytest configuration.

title: Phase 2: Create Dockerfile and .dockerignore
description: Create container image definition for Indigo with Python, llama-cpp-python, and Flask
